Appearance

AI-FirstPrepare Your Repository for AI Coding Agents

CLI tool that generates instant context for OpenCode, Cursor, Claude Code, and more. Save 50-90% in tokens and get AI agents up to speed in seconds.

Get Started
View on GitHub

⚡ Instant Context

Generate comprehensive context files in seconds. AI understands your project in ~500 tokens instead of 50,000.

🔌 Multi-Agent Support

Works with OpenCode, Cursor, Claude Code, Windsurf, GitHub Copilot, and any AI coding assistant.

🗄️ SQLite Index

Fast symbol queries with indexed database. Search functions, classes, and imports instantly.

🧠 Semantic Search

Vector embeddings for intelligent code search. Find relevant code by meaning, not just keywords.

📊 Module Graph

Visualize your codebase architecture. Understand dependencies and module relationships.

🌐 Multi-Language

Supports TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust, Java, C#, Ruby, PHP, and more.

Released under the MIT License.
